title: Gekoloniseerd (specerijen mod)
description:
Zalige specerijen en andere VOC-gerelateerde dingen
(Only in dutch for authenticity)
body:
Use spices to spice ur food and get potion effects from it! You can also make other VOC related stuff like a cannon. 

(only in dutch to keep it authentic)

Also it adds some fun paintings and a music disc ;)
